title: Cam's Better Lights
description: Adds a range of lights to brighten up your builds!
body:
**Lights, for when the sun just won't cut it!**

 

Cam's Better Lights adds a range of new light sources into the game. Whether it's a cute little house, a garden, a factory, an alien spaceship, or a car: Cam's Better Lights has the light for you!

All lights can be toggled by hand or with redstone, for the height of flexibility!

 

Thanks for playing, you're the best!

  

Love this mod? Feel free to add it to your modpack and share it with your friends! 

 

Have a great day :)
